cases.title: My registrations paginated list served by single API call without N+1 fan-out per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Participant with registrations across multiple events
Authenticated participant JWT
Ability to observe API calls during my registrations list load
steps: Load my registrations data for page 1 via service or HTTP
Count list endpoint calls during the operation
Verify no per-event registration-status or event-detail fan-out loops
cases.expected: Exactly one paginated GET /me/registrations call serves the list; no per-event registration fetch loops per testing-plan §3 row: My registrations paginated → single API call, no N+1 fan-out (AC-14, FR-29)

cases.title: My registrations repository executes single paginated query at DB boundary
preconditions: Participant with registrations across at least three events persisted in Postgres
Real database test harness with transaction rollback per test
Authenticated participant actor
steps: Invoke my-registrations list query via registration module/service with page=1, pageSize=20
Verify query plan or call count shows one paginated SELECT with JOIN for event metadata
Compare returned items to direct COUNT and OFFSET/LIMIT expectations
cases.expected: Module returns paginated envelope from a single database query with event name denormalized or joined; no N+1 per-registration or per-event follow-up queries; module-integration boundary exercises real DB transaction without loading unbounded dataset

cases.title: My registrations page-2 boundary returns expected slice without full-dataset load
preconditions: Participant with at least 21 registrations across events (exceeds default pageSize of 20)
Authenticated participant JWT
Registrations seeded with distinct updatedAt values for sort verification
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 and record total and totalPages
GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=2&pageSize=20
Compare page-2 items to expected second slice ordered by updatedAt descending
cases.expected: Page-2 response has page=2, pageSize=20, total matching page-1 total, items are the correct contiguous slice; each response contains at most pageSize rows; server returns one page at a time per AC-14 server-driven listing

cases.title: GET /api/v1/me/registrations returns HTTP 200 paginated envelope with page, pageSize, and total
preconditions: Participant with at least one registration across events
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with Participant Authorization bearer
Verify HTTP status code and response body shape
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items (array), page=1, pageSize=20, total (integer), and totalPages per API design §3 response envelope; each item includes registrationId, eventId, eventName, state, and updatedAt; no bare array response

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events returns bounded page slice not full unbounded catalog
preconditions: At least 13 published events visible to participant (more than default pageSize of 12)
Authenticated participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and record total and items.length
GET /api/v1/events?page=2&pageSize=12
Verify neither response items.length exceeds pageSize while total reflects full catalog
cases.expected: Each response contains at most pageSize items; total reflects full matching row count; client receives one page at a time per AC-14 (no unbounded full-catalog payload in a single call)

cases.title: My Registrations page paginates with correct range, prev/next controls, and quick actions
preconditions: Participant with more than 20 registrations across events
Authenticated participant on /registrations (My Registrations) route
At least one registration eligible for check-in or feedback quick action
steps: Navigate to My Registrations page
Verify pagination controls, item range summary (e.g. Showing 1–20 of N), and registration rows with status
Confirm contextual quick-action links where applicable (check-in or feedback)
Click Next to advance to page 2 and observe network requests
cases.expected: Page renders at most pageSize registration rows with event name, status, and quick actions; prev/next pagination controls present; page change triggers single GET /me/registrations with updated page parameter; only current page rows rendered client-side per page list and AC-14

cases.title: Participant event browse exposes Previous and Next pagination controls
preconditions: At least 13 published events visible to the participant (more than default pageSize of 12)
Authenticated participant on /events browse page
steps: Navigate to participant event browse list
Verify pagination region is visible with page metadata and item range
Click Next to advance to page 2
Verify displayed event cards update to the second page slice only
cases.expected: Pagination controls include Previous and Next (or equivalent page navigation); page indicator shows current page; only one page of event cards is rendered at a time per AC-14 and page list event discovery requirements

cases.title: Organizer operational tables expose server pagination controls without unbounded client render
preconditions: Event with registrations, waitlist, attendance, or eligibility rows exceeding one page
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope on registrations, eligibility, check-in, or audit log listing page
steps: Open organizer operational listing (registrations, waitlist, attendance, eligibility, or audit logs)
Verify table renders pagination controls with page metadata
Navigate forward one page via Next
Count rendered table rows during and after navigation
cases.expected: Table exposes prev/next page controls and displays only the current server page of rows; rendered row count never exceeds pageSize; no table renders an unbounded full dataset client-side per AC-14 and page list organizer sections

cases.title: Participant denied paginated organizer registrations list with HTTP 403
preconditions: Event with registrations exceeding one page
Authenticated Participant JWT without organizer list permissions per 01-roles-permissions.md
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with Participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized; Participant role cannot view organizer operational registration lists per permission matrix; paginated listing endpoint enforces RBAC before returning envelope

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied paginated registrations list for unassigned event with HTTP 403
preconditions: Event outside OrganizerStaff assigned scope with registrations
Authenticated OrganizerStaff JWT for a different assigned event set
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with OrganizerStaff Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized; OrganizerStaff scope constraint blocks paginated list access for events outside assigned scope per 01-roles-permissions.md §3

cases.title: Pagination disables Previous on first page and Next on last page
preconditions: Listing page with at least two pages of data
Authenticated actor with access to the listing
steps: Load listing page on page 1 and verify Previous control is disabled
Navigate to the last page and verify Next control is disabled
cases.expected: Previous is disabled when page=1; Next is disabled when page equals totalPages; prevents navigation beyond available pages per AC-14 page control contract

cases.title: Changing event browse filters resets pagination to page 1
preconditions: Participant on event browse page navigated to page 2 or higher
Search or state filter controls available
steps: Navigate to page 2 of event browse results
Change search query or state filter
Observe pagination state and API request page parameter
cases.expected: Filter change resets displayed page to 1; subsequent GET /events uses page=1 with updated filter parameters; avoids stale page index on new result set per page list guidance

cases.title: Single-page result set hides or disables next navigation appropriately
preconditions: Listing page where total results fit within one page (totalPages=1)
Authenticated actor with access to the listing
steps: Load listing page with totalPages=1
Inspect pagination controls and rendered row count
cases.expected: Next control is disabled or pagination indicates no further pages; client renders all available items for the single page without attempting to fetch or render additional pages

cases.title: Rapid consecutive page clicks do not render overlapping unbounded row sets
preconditions: Listing page with at least three pages of data
Network throttling or request observation enabled
steps: Click Next twice in quick succession
Observe DOM row/card count during and after navigation settles
cases.expected: Rendered list length never exceeds pageSize during navigation; final view reflects the latest requested page only; no accumulation of prior page rows in the client DOM per AC-14 unbounded dataset prohibition

cases.title: Listing pages fetch one server page per view when total exceeds 500 rows
preconditions: Database seeded with >500 registrations for one participant across events
Authenticated participant JWT
steps: Load my registrations page 1 and record response payload item count
Navigate to page 2
Compare number of list items in each API response to total row count
cases.expected: Each page load retrieves exactly one paginated API response with items.length <= pageSize; client never receives or renders the full >500-row dataset in a single response per AC-14 and NFR-16 single-page constraint

cases.title: Pagination metadata on UI matches API envelope total and totalPages
preconditions: Listing page with known total row count exceeding one page
Authenticated actor with list access
steps: Load listing page and capture GET list API response (items, total, totalPages, page, pageSize)
Compare UI page indicator and item range text to API metadata
Navigate to page 2 and re-compare
cases.expected: UI displays page count and item range consistent with API total and totalPages; metadata remains stable when navigating between pages per reliable client-side pagination control requirements

cases.title: Organizer Staff assigned events list is paginated with page controls
preconditions: OrganizerStaff assigned to more events than one page holds
Authenticated staff user on assigned events list
steps: Open assigned events list
Verify pagination controls are present
Navigate to next page if available
cases.expected: Staff assigned events list exposes prev/next page controls and renders only the current page of events per page list organizer staff section and AC-14

cases.title: Unauthenticated paginated list API request returns HTTP 401 not unbounded data leak
preconditions: API running
No Authorization header
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 without credentials
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with typed error envelope; unauthenticated access to protected paginated endpoint rejected per AC-15; no partial list data returned
